messageHandlers.script:
"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Assigned payload values to params			
	"""	
	# implement your handler here
	self.props.text = payload["currentRoleName"]
	self.view.params.roleName = payload["roleName"]
	self.view.params.roleDescription = payload["roleDescription"]

config.script:
"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Open rolepopup display			
	"""	
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.openDock('rightp')
	system.perspective.sendMessage("rolePopupDisplay",payload={"display":0},scope='page')
	system.perspective.sendMessage("savebutton",payload={"name":"Next"},scope='page')
	system.perspective.sendMessage("popup_View",payload={"display":0,"text":''},scope='page')

"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Add/update module and form access to role			
	"""	
	try:
		screens = self.view.custom.screenData
		if self.session.custom.type == "Add":
			roleName = self.view.params.roleName
			description = self.view.params.roleDescription
			createdBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.InsertRoles.InsertRolesConfiguration(roleName, description, createdBy)
			pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
			for data in pyData:
				roleID = data["MST_Role_Id"]
				break
				
#			screens = self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RoleColumnContainer").getChild("FormFlexRepeater").props.instances
			system.perspective.print(screens)
			for screen in screens:
				system.perspective.print(screen)
				moduleId = screen["moduleId"]
				formID =  screen["Id"]
				isEdit = screen["IsSelected"]
				if isEdit:
					isEdit = 1
				else:
					isEdit = 0
				Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.InsertRELRoleForm.InsertRELRoleForm(roleID, moduleId, formID, createdBy, isEdit)
				
		else:
#			screens = self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RoleColumnContainer").getChild("FormFlexRepeater").props.instances
			MST_Role_Id = self.session.custom.selectedRoleID
			createdBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			for screen in screens:
				system.perspective.print(screen)
				moduleId = screen["moduleId"]
				formID =  screen["Id"]
				isEdit = screen["IsSelected"]
				Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.InsertRELRoleForm.UpdateRELRoleForm(MST_Role_Id, moduleId, formID, createdBy, isEdit)
			
		system.perspective.openDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.sendMessage("rolePopupDisplay",payload={"display":0},scope='page')
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/RolePermission')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntColumn/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
try:
	#start of try block
		self.props.text = payload["name"]
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/RolePermission')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:savebutton  -> btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Return selected module list			
	"""	
	try:
		# implement your handler here
		moduleId = int(payload["ModuleID"])
		self.view.params.moduleIds.append(moduleId)
		moduleIds = self.view.params.moduleIds
		screenData = self.view.custom.screenData
		optionList = []
		for screen in screenData:
			if screen["moduleId"] in moduleIds:
				dict = {
					"instanceStyle": {
					  "classes": ""
					},
					"instancePosition": {}
				  }
				dict["fieldName"] = screen["fieldName"]
				dict["Id"] = screen["Id"]
				dict["moduleId"] = screen["moduleId"]
				dict["IsSelected"] = screen["IsSelected"]
				optionList.append(dict)
		self.getSibling("FormFlexRepeater").props.instances = optionList
					
	except:
		screenName ='Role configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/RolePermission/')  
		errorFunction = str('MessageHandler-->moduleSelection')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Return role data list			
	"""	
	# implement your handler here
	dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.getData.getRoles()
	pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
	optionList = []
	for data in pyData:
		dict = {
			"instanceStyle": {
			  "classes": ""
			},
			"instancePosition": {}
		  }
		dict["fieldName"] = data["RoleName"]
		dict["Id"] = data["MST_Role_Id"]
		optionList.append(dict)
	self.props.instances = optionList

"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Return user and its role details in list			
	"""	
	# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print(payload)
	roleID = payload["roleID"]
	dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.getData.getUserBasedOnRoles(roleID)
	pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
	optionList = []
	for data in pyData:
		dict = {
			"instanceStyle": {
			  "classes": ""
			},
			"instancePosition": {}
		  }
		dict["fieldName"] = data["UserName"]
		dict["Id"] = data["MST_User_Id"]
		dict["roleID"] = data["MST_Role_Id"]
		optionList.append(dict)
	self.props.instances = optionList
	system.perspective.print("message handler for user selection")

"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Return user selected modules list			
	"""	
	try:
		# implement your handler here
		moduleId = int(payload["ModuleID"])
		self.custom.moduleIds.append(moduleId)
		moduleIds = self.custom.moduleIds
		screenData = self.getSibling("UserFormFlexRepeater").custom.screenData
		optionList = []
		for screen in screenData:
			if screen["moduleId"] in moduleIds:
				dict = {
					"instanceStyle": {
					  "classes": ""
					},
					"instancePosition": {}
				  }
				dict["fieldName"] = screen["fieldName"]
				dict["Id"] = screen["Id"]
				dict["moduleId"] = screen["moduleId"]
				dict["IsSelected"] = screen["IsSelected"]
				optionList.append(dict)
		self.getSibling("UserFormFlexRepeater").props.instances = optionList
					
	except:
		screenName ='Role configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/RolePermission/TabContainer/UserColumnContainer')  
		errorFunction = str('MessageHandler-->usermoduleSelection')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Return user selected form with edit permission in list			
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	userID = payload["userID"]
	system.perspective.print("userscreenData")
	dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.getData.getUserScreen(userID)
	pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
	optionList = []
	for data in pyData:
		dict = {
			"instanceStyle": {
			  "classes": ""
			},
			"instancePosition": {}
		  }
		dict["fieldName"] = data["Screen name"]
		if data["Edit permission"] == 1:
			dict["IsSelected"] = True
		else:
			dict["IsSelected"] =False
		dict["Id"] = data["FormID"]
		dict["moduleId"] = data["ModuleID"]
		optionList.append(dict)
	self.custom.screenData = optionList

try:
	#start of try block
		self.props.currentTabIndex = payload["CurrentTabName"]
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/RolePermission')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:currentTabIndex  -> TabContainer')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

config.script:
try:
		system.perspective.openDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.sendMessage("rolePopupDisplay",payload={"display":0},scope='page')
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/RolePermission')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntColumn/btnCancel')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
"""
	Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
	Written Date: 30/04/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Cancel all selection and reset to default value.			
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		system.perspective.openDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.sendMessage("rolePopupDisplay",payload={"display":0},scope='page')	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("savebutton",payload={"name":"Next"},scope='page')
		system.perspective.sendMessage("popup_View",payload={"display":0,"text":''},scope='page')	
		messageType = 'confirmationPopup'   
		payload={'isVisible':0,'message':'','fromScreen':''} 	 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,payload,scope = 'page' )	
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/PopUp/RolePermission')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:confirmation  -> TabContainer/btnCancel')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block
